zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich於1416年8月21日出生在奧地利提洛爾音斯布盧可時，她的父親Ernest I von Habsburg38歲，母親Cymburgis of Masovia22歲。她於1431年6月3日與Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen在薩辛阿赤 萊格萊格結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1486年2月12日在德國薩辛瑙包格阿爾騰包格享年69歲，埋葬在德國薩辛瑙包格阿爾騰包格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich于1416年8月21日出生在奥地利提洛爾音斯布盧可时，她的父亲Ernest I von Habsburg38岁，母亲Cymburgis of Masovia22岁。她于1431年6月3日与Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen在薩辛阿赤 萊格萊格结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1486年2月12日在德国薩辛瑙包格阿爾騰包格享年69岁，埋葬在德国薩辛瑙包格阿爾騰包格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Österreich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Kurt, Uwe, Wolfgang.

German (rarely Österreich) and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the province of Upper or Lower Austria, from German Österreich ‘Austria’, the name of which literally means ‘Eastern kingdom’.

variants.name: Oestreicher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Franz, Otto, Horst.  Jewish Shloime, Chaim, Mendy.
German (also Östreicher) and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from the province of Upper or Lower Austria (see Oesterreich ).

variants.name: Oestreich
meanings: German (also Östreich) and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Oesterreich .

nameMeanings.name: Margaretha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich was born on 21 August 1416, in Innsbruck, Tirol, Austria, her father, Ernest I von Habsburg, was 38 and her mother, Cymburgis of Masovia, was 22. She married Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen on 3 June 1431, in Leipzig, Amt Leipzig, Saxony. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 12 February 1486, in Altenburg, Naumburg, Saxony, Germany, at the age of 69, and was buried in Altenburg, Naumburg, Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich est née le 21 août 1416, à Innsbruck, Tirol, Autriche, son père, Ernest I von Habsburg, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Cymburgis of Masovia, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen le 3 juin 1431, à Leipzig, Amt Leipzig, Sachsen. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 février 1486, à Altenburg, Naumburg, Sachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Altenburg, Naumburg, Sachsen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich am 21. August 1416 in Innsbruck, Tirol, Österreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ernest I von Habsburg 38 und ihre Mutter Cymburgis of Masovia 22. Sie hat am 3. Juni 1431 in Leipzig, Amt Leipzig, Sachsen Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Februar 1486 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Altenburg, Naumburg, Sachsen, Deutschland und wurde in Altenburg, Naumburg, Sachsen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich è nata il il 21 agosto 1416 nel Innsbruck, Tirolo, Austria, sua padre, Ernest I von Habsburg, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Cymburgis of Masovia, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen il 3 giugno 1431, nel Leipzig, Amt Leipzig, Sachsen. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 12 febbraio 1486, nel Altenburg, Naumburg, Sachsen, Germania, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Altenburg, Naumburg, Sachsen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaretha Herzogin von Österreichが1416年8月21日にオーストリアティロルインスブルックで生まれた時，父Ernest I von Habsburgは38歳，母Cymburgis of Masoviaは22歳であった。1431年6月3日にサチセンアムト レイプズイグレイプズイグでFriederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1486年2月12日にドイツサチセンナウンブルグアルテンブルグで69歳で死去し，ドイツサチセンナウンブルグアルテンブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.Brandenburg, Heiligenbeil, East Prussia,: 독일 플레우ss 오스트플레우ss 크레이스 헤이리겐브일 브랜덴버그

ko.lifeSummary: Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich(이)가 1416년 8월 21일 오스트리아 티럴 이스브럭에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ernest I von Habsburg(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cymburgis of Masovia(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1431년 6월 3일 작센 아트 레이p지그 레이p지그에서 Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1486년 2월 12일 독일 작센 나버그 알텐버그에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 작센 나버그 알텐버그에 묻혔다.

pt.Bruck an der Mur, Styria, Austria: Bruck an der Mur, Steiermark, Áustria
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich nasceu em 21 de agosto de 1416, em Innsbruck, Tirol, Áustria, seu pai, Ernest I von Habsburg, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Cymburgis of Masovia, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen em 3 de junho de 1431, em Leipzig, Amt Leipzig, Sachsen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1486, em Altenburg, Naumburg, Sachsen, Alemanha, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Altenburg, Naumburg, Sachsen, Alemanha.

ru.Bruck an der Mur, Styria, Austria: брукк ан дир мур, стиирмарк, Австрия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich родилась 21 августа 1416 г. в местности иннсбрукк, тирол, Австрия, её отцу по имени Ernest I von Habsburg было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Cymburgis of Masovia, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen 3 июня 1431 г. в местности липзиг, амт липзиг, сачсен. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 12 февраля 1486 г. в местности алтенбург, наумбург, сачсен, Германия в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности алтенбург, наумбург, сачсен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaretha Herzogin von Österreich nació el 21 de agosto de 1416, en Innsbruck, Tirol, Austria, su papá, Ernest I von Habsburg, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Cymburgis of Masovia, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Friederich II. von Weltin, Churfürst von Sachsen el 3 de junio de 1431, en Leipzig, Amt Leipzig, Sachsen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 12 de febrero de 1486, en Altenburg, Naumburg, Sachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Altenburg, Naumburg, Sachsen, Alemania.
